annotations.kubernetes.io/description: Contains a CA bundle that can be used to verify the kube-apiserver when using internal endpoints such as the internal service IP or kubernetes.default.svc. No other usage is guaranteed across distributions of Kubernetes clusters.

data.unbound.conf:
remote-control:
control-enable: yes
control-interface: /opt/unbound/run/unbound.ctl

dnstap:
dnstap-enable: yes
dnstap-socket-path: "/opt/unbound/etc/unbound/dnstap/dnstap.sock"
dnstap-send-identity: no
dnstap-send-version: no
dnstap-log-resolver-query-messages: yes
dnstap-log-resolver-response-messages: yes
dnstap-log-client-query-messages: yes
dnstap-log-client-response-messages: yes
dnstap-log-forwarder-query-messages: yes
dnstap-log-forwarder-response-messages: yes

server:
cache-min-ttl: 60
cache-max-ttl: 3600
cache-max-negative-ttl: 7200
infra-host-ttl: 900
num-threads: 96

prefetch: yes
minimal-responses: yes

verbosity: 1
extended-statistics: yes
do-daemonize: no
use-syslog: no
log-time-ascii: yes
log-queries: no
log-replies: no
log-servfail: yes
log-tag-queryreply: no
log-local-actions: no
val-log-level: 1

interface: 0.0.0.0
port: 53
prefer-ip6: no
prefer-ip4: yes
do-ip4: yes
do-ip6: no
do-udp: yes
do-tcp: yes
access-control: 0.0.0.0/0 allow
tcp-upstream: no
outgoing-range: 8192
outgoing-port-permit: "49152-60999"
outgoing-num-tcp: 250
incoming-num-tcp: 10
tcp-mss: 0
outgoing-tcp-mss: 0
tcp-idle-timeout: 3000
so-reuseport: yes
max-udp-size: 4096
stream-wait-size: 4m
msg-buffer-size: 65552
msg-cache-size: 50m
msg-cache-slabs: 128
num-queries-per-thread: 4192
jostle-timeout: 200
delay-close: 376
udp-connect: yes
outbound-msg-retry: 5
unknown-server-time-limit: 376
rrset-cache-size: 100m
rrset-cache-slabs: 128
infra-cache-min-rtt: 50
infra-keep-probing: no
infra-cache-slabs: 128
infra-cache-numhosts: 10000
key-cache-size: 4m
key-cache-slabs: 128
neg-cache-size: 4m
hide-version: yes
hide-trustanchor: yes
hide-http-user-agent: yes
target-fetch-policy: "3 2 1 0 0"
harden-short-bufsize: yes
harden-large-queries: yes
harden-glue: yes
harden-dnssec-stripped: yes
harden-below-nxdomain: yes
harden-referral-path: no
harden-algo-downgrade: yes
qname-minimisation: yes
qname-minimisation-strict: no
aggressive-nsec: yes
use-caps-for-id: no
unwanted-reply-threshold: 10000000
do-not-query-localhost: yes
serve-expired-client-timeout: 1800

private-domain: "cluster.local"
domain-insecure: "cluster.local"

# Set the working directory for the program.
directory: "/opt/unbound/etc/unbound"
# Drop user  privileges after  binding the port.
username: "_unbound"
# File with trust anchor for  one  zone, which is tracked with RFC5011
# probes.
# Enable chroot (i.e, change apparent root directory for the current
# running process and its children)
chroot: ""
#root-hints: "/opt/unbound/etc/unbound/root.hints"

domain-insecure: "in-addr.arpa."
local-zone: "in-addr.arpa." always_nxdomain
local-zone: "amazonaws.com" redirect
local-data: "amazonaws.com. CNAME nvcf-proxy-cache.container-caching.svc.cluster.local"
local-zone: "huggingface.co" redirect
local-data: "huggingface.co. CNAME nvcf-proxy-cache.container-caching.svc.cluster.local"
local-zone: "hf.co" redirect
local-data: "hf.co. CNAME nvcf-proxy-cache.container-caching.svc.cluster.local"
local-zone: "c3d-farm-renders-ap-northeast-1.s3.ap-northeast-1.amazonaws.com." transparent

local-zone: "nvcf-unbound.test." redirect
local-data: "nvcf-unbound.test. 10800 IN NS nvcf-unbound.test."
local-data: "nvcf-unbound.test. 10800 IN SOA nvcf-unbound.test. nobody.invalid. 1 3600 1200 604800 10800"
local-data: "nvcf-unbound.test. 10800 IN A 127.0.0.1"
local-data: "nvcf-unbound.test. 10800 IN AAAA ::1"

#include: /opt/unbound/etc/unbound/stub-zones.conf
stub-zone:
    name: "cluster.local"
    stub-addr: 172.20.0.10
    stub-first: no
    stub-no-cache: no

stub-zone:
    name: "cluster.local"
    stub-addr: 172.20.0.10
    stub-first: no
    stub-no-cache: no"},"kind":"ConfigMap","metadata":{"annotations":{"argocd.argoproj.io/tracking-id":"nvcf-unbound:/ConfigMap:dns-proxy/nvcf-unbound-config"},"labels":{"app":"nvcf-unbound","app.kubernetes.io/instance":"nvcf-unbound","app.kubernetes.io/managed-by":"Helm","app.kubernetes.io/name":"nvcf-unbound","app.kubernetes.io/version":"0.0.1","helm.sh/chart":"nvcf-unbound-0.9.3"},"name":"nvcf-unbound-config","namespace":"dns-proxy"}}

stub-zone:
    name: "cluster.local"
    stub-addr: 172.20.0.10
    stub-first: no
    stub-no-cache: yes
